overall.description: A stationary cinematic shot from a video game showing a wizarding school outdoor classroom under a timber pavilion. Students in dark robes practice spellcasting at wooden tables while an instructor observes, with a misty forest backdrop creating an atmospheric magical learning environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor classroom pavilion for magical instruction

student near the right side casts a spell, creating a visible magical effect

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a magical outdoor classroom under a large wooden pavilion with timber beams and stone flooring. Students in wizard robes stand scattered at wooden tables practicing spellcasting, while an instructor observes from near a dark cabinet at the back. The cool, misty forest visible through the open sides creates an atmospheric setting for the magical instruction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary, atmospheric perspective of a magical outdoor classroom nestled within a misty woodland. It begins by framing the interior of a large wooden pavilion, where timber beams and stone flooring house students in dark robes practicing spellcasting at wooden tables. As the eye wanders through the space, the focus shifts toward the back of the room where an instructor observes the lesson from beside a dark cabinet. The scene finally expands outward through the open sides of the structure, blending the structured learning environment with the cool, enveloping fog of the surrounding forest.
